title: cephalaria syriaca
intro: Cephalaria syriaca, also known as Syrian scabious, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its tall stems and clusters of small flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cephalaria syriaca include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cephalaria syriaca can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies and supplements.
